  "findings": [
    "Notching or boring in structural joists exceeds the prescriptive limits set by the IRC.",
    "Structural integrity of the floor or ceiling framing is compromised due to over-notching."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop further rough-in work that relies on these joists.",
    "Sister the damaged joists or install approved structural reinforcement/headers to restore load-bearing capacity.",
    "Re-route utilities if necessary to avoid re-damaging the structural members."
  ],
  "rationale": "The structural framing fails inspection because the notches or bored holes in the joists exceed the maximum allowable depths and locations specified by IRC R502.8 (which limits notches to 1/6 the depth of the member, not in the middle third of the span, and holes to 1/3 the depth, no closer than 2 inches to the edges).",
  "references": [
    "IRC R502.8",
    "IRC R602.6"
  ]
}
